description: Starting point. Paul and Silas begin the second missionary journey. Timothy joins them.
Paul visits churches established on first journey. Strengthens disciples in the faith.
Paul has a vision of a Macedonian man calling for help. Takes the gospel to Europe.
Port city. Gateway to Macedonia. Paul's first stop in Europe.
First European city where Paul preaches. Lydia and Philippian jailer both convert to Christ.
Paul preaches in synagogue. Mob violence forces him to leave after three weeks.
Jews here more receptive. They search Scriptures daily to verify Paul's teachings.
Paul addresses philosophers at Mars Hill. Discusses the unknown god and resurrection.
Paul stays 18 months. Preaches, works as tentmaker, plants strong church.
Brief stop. Paul promises to return. Preaches in synagogue, initial establishment of church.
Paul returns home after second journey, reporting on the churches planted in Europe and Asia.
